items.title: Chicago Bulls Reportedly Believed Patrick Williams Could Become Kawhi Leonard
items.author: Yahoo Sports

items.title: [Collier] “... before [Patrick Williams] hit free agency, the team signed him to a 5-year, $90 million contract. Several staffers said they were blindsided by the terms. “It took probably 3 or 4 years for them to come off of the, ‘Well, he could be Kawhi,’ statements,” the ex-staffer told ESPN.”
